# Real deck lists, exactly as players pasted them.
# Preset `commander-section`, last 30 days, PostHog project 476486.
# 247 decks. Regenerate: scripts/export-deck-import-corpus.py --preset commander-section
#
#   imported  — cards the import actually built
#   requested — sum of the quantities we parsed
#   entries   — card lines the parser accepted
#   excluded  — cards dropped under a sideboard-style header
#
# Deck bodies are verbatim and contain blank lines, so blocks are delimited
# by the `===== DECK` lines below — never by blank lines.
